description_long: This building features a traditional East Asian architectural style, with a prominent gabled roof and upward-curving eaves. The structure is two stories tall, with symmetrical rows of arched windows on both levels, each window framed in a dark trim that contrasts with the light beige walls. The roof is composed of two main sections, one slightly taller and set back, both covered in dark brown tiles with a ribbed texture. The front facade includes a central entrance with a small overhanging awning supported by brackets, adding to the ornate appearance. The building's overall form is rectangular, with subtle outward curves along the walls and roof edges, giving it a stylized, almost cartoon-like appearance. The windows are illuminated, suggesting an inviting, inhabited interior.
description: A two-story East Asian-style building with upward-curving, ribbed brown roofs, arched windows, and a central entrance with an awning.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an awning, symmetrical arched windows, and the ornate gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the double-tiered, ribbed roof structure and rows of windows on both stories.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the staggered roof heights and the building's rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the upward-curving eaves and the side wall with evenly spaced windows.
